03
Why This Evening
Today's topic

What is an
AI-native legal team?

Why "AI-native"?
It's one of the hottest words of the year. We already have AI-native law firms that are radically new in tech and in model. So the real question: can we have an AI-native legal team too?
Why "legal team"?
I used to assume Legal departments were one of the most tech-forward fields. Running and attending events across this space, I found the reality is very different from what I expected.
04

How Tonight Works

The flow of the night

Three short talks, then the floor is yours — and we close over drinks.

The talks · ~10 min each
1
Stacy LettieHead of Legal Ops, Organon
2
Marc MandelSVP & GC, EXOS
3
Matthew WojtkowiakCLO, ECI
Topics they may cover
Defining AI-native Reality on the ground AI adoption & efficacy State of the tech Team skills Building an AI roadmap
Then — open floor + lightning talks

A few of you signed up for 5-minute lightning talks. The format:

1
One line: what is an AI-native legal team, in your mind?
2
Then pick one of the questions below that hits closest, and share for ~5 min.
Q1
Reality checkWhat's actually working vs. what's still hype?
Q2
GovernanceManaging risk as agents take on real work.
Q3
PeopleBuilding and training a team that's ready.
Then: happy hour 🥂
